message.content:
Explore the OA project at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\ to find all code related to "AI日报" (AI daily report) configuration. Look for:
1. Any controllers, services, models related to AI daily report config
2. Any existing notification/email configuration for daily reports
3. Database tables related to daily report config
4. Frontend components for daily report configuration

Search in oa-server, oa-core, and oa-frontend directories. Be thorough - check controllers, services, models, migrations, routes, and frontend components. Report file paths and key code snippets.
